payload.label: towel
payload.long_description: Vertical rectangular white towel with a central embroidered decorative motif, faint darkening near edges, and a soft textile texture; towel is partially cut off by the crop at top and bottom and image is low-resolution/blurry; approximate distance to camera ~0.6 m.

message.content: {"label":"towel","short_description":"white embroidered towel, edge-crop","long_description":"Vertical rectangular white towel with a central embroidered decorative motif, faint darkening near edges, and a soft textile texture; towel is partially cut off by the crop at top and bottom and image is low-resolution/blurry; approximate distance to camera ~0.6 m.","attributes":["white/cream color","central embroidery motif","rectangular vertical orientation","edge-cropped (top and bottom)","textile fabric texture","faint discoloration/darkened edges","low-resolution/blurry"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.6}
